subject: RewardRelicPickup
adopted_concept: Transparent 2D and 3D-facing reward pickup decals for the two vertical-slice relic rewards and their claim states.
product_line_role: Reward Reliquary / Relic pickup state read
motif_limit_policy: Reward differences stay in relic silhouette, lid/petal opening, pickup disc, and signal placement; no generic coin, key, crown, chest, text, or inventory icon motif.

asset_request.source: inferred because no visual asset_request.yaml for this reward relic pickup family was present in the checkout
out_of_scope_asset_requests: Assets/Art/ModelRigAnimation/Enemy/MeleeShardling/SealedLockRelic_v0.1.0/asset_request.yaml is a model/rig animation request and was not used for this reward pickup decal request.
asset_request.usage_context: FOURFOLD ECHOES vertical-slice reward pickup read for FE_RELIC_EmberSeed_01, FE_RELIC_RootSigil_01, RelicChest reward glow, and reward receiver pad feedback

constraints.texture_budget: 512px atlas for BaseColor/Mask/Normal/Emissive plus 256px per-state maps and 128px transparent decals
constraints.tile_mode: not a loop tile; clamp transparent decals

prompt_contract:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Unity transparent reward pickup decals plus 3D material atlas maps
Primary request: compact FOURFOLD ECHOES folded reliquary reward relic pickups for two vertical-slice relic rewards, no text, no decorative background
Style/medium: procedural 2D raster, transparent top-down pickup decal and PBR-intent texture maps in the folded reliquary miniature product line
Subject: EmberSeed and RootSigil reward pickup states built from small folded relic vessels, chunky tabs, lid/petal opening, pickup disc, and one functional reward signal thread
Composition/framing: centered top-down silhouette, generous transparent padding, readable at 64px/128px/256px, 512px atlas quadrants
Color palette: warm amber EmberSeed, muted root-green RootSigil, ivory/gold folded slab material, cool shadow support; saturated but not neon
Materials/textures: broad color planes, bevel-like normal detail, sparse reward emission, no coin icon, no generic treasure chest, no photoreal dirt, no noisy scan texture
Constraints: PNG maps, transparent outside silhouette, no labels, no letters, no watermark, no external IP style names, variations differ by silhouette, lid/petal opening, material temperature, socket shape, and signal placement rather than color alone
Avoid: generic coin, generic key, inventory icon, magic rune circle, crown, treasure chest silhouette, text, fine decorative clutter, external-IP motif

unity_import.texture_type: Sprite (2D and UI) for transparent pickup decals; Default for BaseColor/Mask/Emissive; Normal Map for Normal textures

texture_maps.Mask_channels: R=occlusion/silhouette depth, G=roughness group, B=emissive mask, A=alpha/coverage

variants.name: EmberSeedIdle
variants.difference: warm seed pickup, closed folded pod, amber reward core held low

variants.name: EmberSeedClaim
variants.difference: warm seed pickup, opened pod petals, brighter claim glow without becoming a generic coin

variants.name: RootSigilIdle
variants.difference: root sigil pickup, ring/sigil silhouette, low green reward socket

variants.name: RootSigilClaim
variants.difference: root sigil pickup, opened ring tabs and resolved green claim thread

qc.edge_bleed: transparent outside silhouette; no colored pixels on image border
qc.tile_seam: not applicable; clamp transparent decals, not loop tiles
